DisplayName.description: Human-readable application name shown to users and administrators.

RedirectUris.description: Space-separated or serialized list of allowed redirect URIs.

PostLogoutRedirectUris.description: Space-separated or serialized list of allowed post-logout redirect URIs.

ConsentType.description: How user consent is handled for the application.

ClientSecret.description: Client secret used by confidential applications.

Name.description: Role name granted to the application.

items.description: Roles granted to the client application.

Name.description: Scope name granted to the application.

items.description: Scopes granted to the client application.

AllowPasswordFlow.description: Whether the resource owner password flow is allowed for this client.

AllowClientCredentialsFlow.description: Whether the client credentials flow is allowed for this client.

AllowAuthorizationCodeFlow.description: Whether the authorization code flow is allowed for this client.

AllowRefreshTokenFlow.description: Whether the client can request refresh tokens.

AllowHybridFlow.description: Whether hybrid response types are allowed for this client.

AllowImplicitFlow.description: Whether implicit response types are allowed for this client.

AllowLogoutEndpoint.description: Whether the client can use the logout endpoint.

AllowIntrospectionEndpoint.description: Whether the client can call the introspection endpoint.

AllowRevocationEndpoint.description: Whether the client can call the revocation endpoint.

RequireProofKeyForCodeExchange.description: Whether PKCE is required for authorization code requests.

RequirePushedAuthorizationRequests.description: Whether the client must use pushed authorization requests.
